task_completion.description: ReqView application is focused and the SRS document is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView window is open, displaying the 'Home Security System' project, and the Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document is selected/visible.

task_completion.description: The Find and Replace feature is invoked in ReqView.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Find and Replace dialog, sidebar, or search bar is visible within the ReqView interface.

task_completion.description: The correct target and replacement terms are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'sensor' is typed into the Find/Search field, and 'detector' is typed into the Replace field.

task_completion.description: The text in the requirements has been updated to the new term.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The requirements text in the main document view shows the word 'detector' in places where 'sensor' would typically be expected.

task_completion.description: The outdated term is no longer visible in the document text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scanning the visible requirements text reveals no remaining instances of the word 'sensor'.
A save action is performed (e.g., clicking File > Save) or there is no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk next to the project or document name) after the replacements are made.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the find and replace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application's built-in find and replace tools, rather than opening the project files in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like `sed`, `awk`, or Python scripts being used to manipulate the SRS.json file.

integrity.description: The document structure and other attributes remain unchanged.
integrity.visual_evidence: The requirement IDs, hierarchy, and columns in ReqView appear intact and unmodified; only the text content has changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target term to find: 'sensor'. Replacement term: 'detector'. The final document must contain exactly 0 occurrences of 'sensor'. The project is located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/find_replace_project and the target SRS document is at documents/SRS.json relative to the project root.
